artPrompt: An absurdly elongated red creature stretching upward out of the frame, its body taffy-thin and impossibly tall, tiny startled head lost in the smoke high above a feral town square, only its lower half lit by the riot below. A single bonfire blast rakes ember light up its towering form, the rest vanishing into night-black sky. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The Creature Is Become Tall
subtitle: (it do be growing)
text:
Upwardness (This do be flying but only the up part.)
When The Creature Is Become Tall enter, it is become taller. Repeat the previous sentence until someone in the room looks at the ceiling.
The Creature Is Become Tall cannot be blocked by anything shorter than it which is everything which is fine.
Ignore the previous ability. It was lying. It is always lying. It is tall and it lies.
flavorText: We measured it once. We do not measure it anymore.
